text: ADVENTIST HEALTH WOMEN'S CLINIC CLACKAMAS WOMEN'S CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full range of women's health services. 10151 SE Sunnyside Road Suite 100a Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-4pm (503) 261-4423 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 261-4423 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Women's Health Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
